name: Forrest

conquest.name: Axe Whirl
conquest.description: Forrest's axe pirouette deals damage per 0.5s to nearby enemies for 3s.

conquest.name: Razor Sharp
conquest.description: Forrest's sharpened axe deals more damage per second.

expedition.name: Woodland Inheritor
expedition.description: Forrest's expert lumberjack skills increase the Town's Sawmill Output.

expedition.name: Master Woodcutter
expedition.description: Forrest utilizes his logging expertise to increase Wood Gathering Speed in the Wilderness.

exclusive_gear_note: Rare heroes do not have exclusive gear.

shard_cost_to_star_up.note: Rare heroes have significantly lower shard requirements than Legendary/Mythic

lore_background.title: The Master Woodcutter
lore_background.derived_character_themes: Infantry lumberjack specialist with axe-based combat. Skill flavor text references "expert lumberjack skills" and "logging expertise" suggesting a working-class woodsman-soldier.

deep_analysis: Forrest is a Rare infantry gathering hero — the wood-focused counterpart to Edwin (stone) and Seth (iron). His Expedition boosts Town Sawmill Output and Wood Gathering Speed by up to +25% each. Essential for farm accounts. Conquest kit has DPS utility via Axe Whirl (AOE per-half-second) and Razor Sharp (self-DPS).

effect_op_codes.description: Rare-tier gathering hero — no rally joiner effect_op code (not a combat hero)
effect_op_codes.source: kingshothandbook.com (rare tier heroes not in effect_op stacking system)

named_pairs.note: Forrest specializes wood, Diana provides stamina reduction

best_partners.source: kingshothandbook.com effect_op stacking math + community lineup guides

order: Max Woodland Inheritor FIRST (Expedition — +25% Sawmill Output)
Then Master Woodcutter (+25% Wood Gathering Speed)
Conquest is filler — Forrest is a gatherer

gear_recommendations.reasoning: Standard infantry archetype at rare tier. Derived from community gear build templates (allclash.com Zoe guide as canonical base for infantry, confirmed by community consensus across allclash, heaven-guardian, kingshothandbook build guides).
sources: allclash.com Zoe build guide (canonical infantry template)

counters.reason: No public source documents explicit hero-vs-hero counter matchups for Kingshot. Community discussions reference troop-type rock-paper-scissors (Infantry > Cavalry > Archer > Infantry) and formation-based counters but not specific hero counters. Check Discord/Reddit for player-tested matchups.
